title: NSOU B.Ed. M.Ed Special Education Admission 2026

detail.title: NSOU B.Ed. M.Ed Special Education Admission 2026
detail.short_info: NSOU B.Ed. M.Ed Special Education Admission 2026 application is open from 12 May to 6 June 2026. Check eligibility, important dates, fees, seat matrix and apply online for RCI-recognized ODL programmes.

sections.heading: NSOU B.Ed. M.Ed Special Education Admission 2026

content.text: NSOU B.Ed. M.Ed Special Education 2026 notification is out. Netaji Subhas Open University (NSOU) has invited online applications for B.Ed. Special Education (IDD/HI/VI) and M.Ed. Special Education (IDD/HI) ODL programmes for the academic year 2026-27.

Netaji Subhas Open University (NSOU), Kolkata, offers recognized B.Ed. and M.Ed. Special Education programmes through Open and Distance Learning (ODL) mode. These programmes are approved by the Rehabilitation Council of India (RCI) and UGC-DEB. Admissions are merit-based with offline central counselling.
Direct Link to Open NSOU B.Ed Special Education Admission: Click Here
Direct Link to Open NSOU M.EdSpecial Education Admission: Click Here

sections.heading: Overview of NSOU Special Education Admission 2026

rows: B.Ed. Special Education (IDD / HI / VI) & M.Ed. Special Education (IDD / HI) – ODL Mode
Recognized by Rehabilitation Council of India (RCI) & UGC-DEB
Offline Central Counselling at NSOU HQ, Kolkata

sections.heading: NSOU B.Ed. Special Education Important Dates 2026

rows: Last date of submission of Online Application Forms
To be notified on 16th June, 2026 along with Provisional Merit List

sections.heading: NSOU M.Ed. Special Education Important Dates 2026

rows: Last date of submission of Online Application Forms
To be notified on 16th June, 2026 along with Provisional Merit List

sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria for NSOU B.Ed. Special Education 2026

items: Candidates with RCI-recognized D.Ed. in Special Education + Bachelor’s/Master’s degree with 50% marks (55% for Engineering/Technology with Science & Maths).
Candidates without D.Ed. Spl. Ed. but with Bachelor’s/Master’s degree with 50% marks (55% for B.E./B.Tech.) are also eligible.
Relaxation for reserved categories as per West Bengal Govt. rules.
Special weightage for parents of children with disability.

sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria for NSOU M.Ed. Special Education 2026

items: B.Ed. Spl. Ed. in IDD/HI with 50% marks + valid RCI Registration, OR
B.Ed. General + D.Ed. Spl. Ed. in IDD/HI with 50% marks each, OR
PG Diploma in Special Education (recognized by RCI till 2014-15), OR
4-year Integrated B.Ed. Spl. Ed. with 50% marks + RCI Registration.
Valid RCI CRR Number is mandatory.

sections.heading: Programme Fees

content.text: B.Ed. Special Education (IDD/HI/VI): Course Fee: ₹40,000/- Processing Fee: ₹500/-
M.Ed. Special Education (IDD/HI): Total Programme Fee: ₹85,000/- (₹40,000 at admission + ₹45,000 at 3rd Semester) Processing Fee: ₹500/-

sections.heading: Seat Matrix & Study Centres

items: B.Ed. Special Education (Total 400 Seats): IDD-200, HI-100, VI-100
M.Ed. Special Education (Total 60 Seats): IDD-30, HI-30

sections.heading: Merit Calculation & Admission Procedure

content.text: Admission is purely on academic merit. Weightage is given to Madhyamik, HS, Graduation, Post-Graduation, and relevant Special Education qualifications. Special weightage (10 marks) for parents of children with disabilities.

sections.heading: How to Apply for NSOU B.Ed. & M.Ed. Special Education 2026

items: Visit the official NSOU website www.wbnsou.ac.in
Fill the online application form carefully.
Pay the processing fee of ₹500.
Upload required documents.
Submit the form before the deadline.
Wait for Provisional Merit List.
Attend Offline Central Counselling at NSOU HQ, Kolkata.

sections.heading: Documents Required

items: Marksheets and certificates of all qualifying examinations
RCI Registration Certificate (mandatory for M.Ed.)
Caste Certificate (for West Bengal candidates)
Disability Certificate of child (for special weightage)
Valid Photo ID Proof
